reviews.review_msg: Doug is the best professor! If he didn't have such a hot ass, I would have stared at his face all day.  He opened my mind to the beauties of the world and made me want to explore the vast abyss of the dark unknown in Tumbleheridge.

I had him for two classes and loved his lectures. They're long, but he keeps them interesting. He occasionally slips the word "sexy" randomly into his lectures - I think this is his clever way of keeping the students awake after the 2 hour mark.

You have to memorize every details from the book if you want to get a normal grade (B onward). The exams have 4 parts : MCQs, Short questions, Essay, and Map. Short Qs and essays are not difficult, you'll be just fine if you are willing to write. MCQs and Map are tricky.  Average was C.
Doug is a fantastic lecturer who keeps the great wealth and variety of material in the survey course bearable with good humour and
Not so good prof. talks really fast. would help if his lectures are recorded. Marks very hard.. NOT recommended..

Doug is an amazing prof! He's really funny and really easy to talk to. He doesn't act like he's superior to the rest of the class. The assignments were interesting and the TA was really nice! The marking was fair and overall I really enjoyed the class. I would definitely recommend Doug as a prof!

Douglas Ross is a decent professor that is able to show interest in course material and convey these to his students. As for the two mid-terms and one final, you need to study from both lectures and textbook in order to do good in this course. So attend class and take notes! Lectures are quite vague!

He's well-meaning and approachable but midterm and final were way too long (I was still writing when he told us to put our pens down). Lecture slides have a lot of text and he goes through material quickly. Doesn't enforce any rules- someone talked on a cellphone in class & talked during the final and he didn't say anything. Likes detailed answers.
